title: reserve() permits a current borrower to also reserve the same book
evidence: catalog/loans.py:53-66 reserve() only guards member/book existence, availability, and duplicate reservations — it does not check whether member_id already holds a loan of book_id
suggestion: Optional: reject reserving a book the member already has on loan; not required by the spec, which only prohibits two reservations by the same member

title: Non-alphabetical import ordering in service.py / loans.py
evidence: catalog/service.py:2 'from catalog.loans import LoanError, ReservationError, LoanService' and catalog/loans.py imports — minor style; likely the source of code_quality=0.833 vs 1.0
suggestion: Sort imported names alphabetically; cosmetic only
